criteria_verification.evidence: Double unquote: %252F -> %2F -> '/'; the resulting '/' fails the allowlist and is reported with reason='traversal'. Verified by TestValidateFeatureIdTraversal::test_validate_feature_id_with_double_encoded_slash_raises_traversal.
criteria_verification.notes: Double unquote: %252F -> %2F -> '/'; the resulting '/' fails the allowlist and is reported with reason='traversal'. Verified by TestValidateFeatureIdTraversal::test_validate_feature_id_with_double_encoded_slash_raises_traversal.

criteria_verification.evidence: Explicit `'\x00' in decoded` check with reason='null_byte'. Verified by TestValidateFeatureIdNullByte::test_validate_feature_id_with_raw_null_byte_raises_null_byte and (additionally) the URL-encoded %00 variant.

criteria_verification.evidence: `not 1 <= len(decoded) <= 64` raises with reason='length'. Verified by TestValidateFeatureIdLength::test_validate_feature_id_with_input_above_length_cap_raises_length, and the boundary test confirms len==64 is accepted.
